home.heroSubtitle: Travel smart, save money and protect the environment. Connect with drivers and passengers on your route.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three easy steps to your ride
home.step1Desc: Enter origin and destination city, pick a date and find a suitable ride.
home.step2Desc: Request seats and wait for driver confirmation.
home.step3Desc: Board and enjoy the trip. Rate the driver after arrival.
home.ctaDesc: Register as a driver and publish your trips.
